mapper.update: UPDATE psp_normal_prescription SET UpErpStatus = 0 WHERE status = 11 AND createdOn BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND UpErpStatus = 2
UPDATE psp_normal_prescription SET UpErpStatus = CASE WHEN STATUS = 1 THEN 2 WHEN STATUS = 11 THEN 3 ELSE UpErpStatus END WHERE FlowNo = #{flowNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN pap_dv.match_pap_dv AND dv_drug.DrugCode IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(dv_drug.DrugCode, ''), 'WDYYP') ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(c.DrugCode, ''), 'WDYYP') END AS "DrugCode", CASE WHEN pap_dv.match_pap_dv THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(pap_dv.drugName, 'jc', '(集采)'), 'JC', '(集采)') ELSE REPLACE(REPLACE(b.ClientDrugName, 'jc', '(集采)'), 'JC', '(集采)') END AS "DrugName", b.DrugUnit AS "DrugSpecification", CASE WHEN pap_dv.match_pap_dv AND dv_drug.DrugCode IS NOT NULL THEN dv_drug.drugPlace ELSE c.drugPlace END AS "DrugPlace", CASE WHEN pap_dv.match_pap_dv AND dv_drug.DrugCode IS NOT NULL THEN dv_drug.DrugFactory ELSE c.DrugFactory END AS "DrugFactory", CASE WHEN pap_dv.match_pap_dv THEN a.PspNum * pap_dv.drugDose * b.DrugDose ELSE a.PspNum * b.DrugDose END AS "DrugConsumption", DATE_FORMAT(b.CreatedOn, '%Y%m%d') AS "DrugConsumptionDate", a.ClientCode AS "HospitalCode", CONCAT('CY', SUBSTRING(a.Pspcode, 3)) AS "PspCode", a.PspType AS "PspType", d.PspDrugAmount AS "PspDrugAmount", a.Patient AS "PatientName", CASE a.STATUS WHEN 11 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 0 END AS "ConsumptionFlg" FROM (SELECT id, ClientCode, PspNum, Pspcode, PspType, Patient, STATUS, flowNo FROM psp_normal_prescription WHERE flowNo = #{flowNo} AND UpErpStatus = 0) a INNER JOIN psp_agreement_prescription_drug b ON a.id = b.pid LEFT JOIN mdm_drug_info c ON c.id = b.drugid LEFT JOIN (SELECT pap.id, pap.clientcode, pap.NAME, dv.PID, dv.drugId, dv.drugName, dv.drugDose, (pap.id IS NOT NULL AND dv.PID IS NOT NULL) AS match_pap_dv FROM psp_agreement_prescription pap LEFT JOIN psp_drug_info_view dv ON pap.id = dv.PID) pap_dv ON a.ClientCode = pap_dv.clientcode AND pap_dv.NAME = b.ClientDrugName LEFT JOIN mdm_drug_info dv_drug ON pap_dv.drugId = dv_drug.id INNER JOIN (SELECT pid, COUNT(*) AS PspDrugAmount FROM psp_agreement_prescription_drug WHERE pid IN (SELECT id FROM psp_normal_prescription WHERE flowNo = #{flowNo} AND UpErpStatus = 0) GROUP BY pid) d ON d.pid = a.id WHERE b.ClientDrugName NOT LIKE '%儿童防感抗敏饮（院内颗粒）%' GROUP BY a.id, b.id, c.id, pap_dv.id, dv_drug.id, b.CreatedOn, a.pspcode, a.Patient, a.STATUS;
SELECT pspCode, clientCode FROM psp_normal_prescription WHERE UpErpStatus = 0 AND DATE (CreatedOn) >='2026-05-16' ORDER BY CreatedOn ASC LIMIT 100
